name: Hopeless Twinkles
recipeInstructions:
1. The Filling: Cream the butter for 5 minutes at medium speed. Add Crisco a little at a time, continuing to beat. Add the sugar gradually while beating. Then add the milk mixed with vanilla, beating frequently and scraping the sides and bottom of the bowl. Beat until smooth.
2. The Cake: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease two 8-inch square cake pans or use a 13x9x2 pan. In a separate bowl, beat each addition for 1 minute before adding it back in. Pour batter into prepared pans and bake for 30-35 minutes (40-45 minutes for an oblong pan) until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. Cool the cake on a rack.
3. Assemble: When the cake is slightly frozen (about 30 minutes in the freezer), cut into 1-1/2x3-1/2 inches bars. Spread half of the bars with the filling and sandwich with an unfrosted bar. Refrigerate up to 2 weeks or freeze for up to 1 year.
From: Donahue Show with Gloria Pitzer Reposted by: Debbie Carlson - Cooking Echo
